name: Mustard Grilled Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Coat the chicken with butter and oil.
2. Broil or grill for 5 minutes per side, basting often.
3. In a bowl, combine vinegar, Dijon mustard, shallot, garlic, thyme, and cumin. Mix well.
4. Gradually blend in enough remaining oil and butter to thicken the mixture. Mix thoroughly.
5. Brush the chicken liberally with the marinade.
6. Coat the chicken with breadcrumbs.
7. Drizzle lightly with oil and butter mixture.
8. Broil or grill until juices run clear when pierced with a fork. Serve hot.
